name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkHeld(i, p) == forks[i] = p

PhilosopherState(i) == states[i]

Thinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
Hungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ states[i] = "thinking"
       /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
       /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ states[i] = "hungry"
       /\ ForkHeld(LEFT(i), i)
       /\ ForkHeld(RIGHT(i), i)
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = forks
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ states[i] = "eating"
       /\ ForkHeld(LEFT(i), i)
       /\ ForkHeld(RIGHT(i), i)
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ states[i] = "hungry"
       /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
       /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: No fork is held by more than one philosopher *)
TypeOK == \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max([num[j] | j \in 1..N]) + 1]
               \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = TRUE
                    /\ \E j \in 1..N : /\ flag[j] = TRUE
                        /\ num[j] < num[i]
                        /\ \E k \in 1..N : /\ flag[k] = TRUE
                            /\ num[k] < num[i]
                            /\ num[k] < num[j]
                    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                    /\ num' = num

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ size \in 0..K
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES kv

Init == 
  /\ kv \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: kv[k] = 0

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
       /\ kv' = [kv EXCEPT ![k] = v]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* No other state changes *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kv>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES chunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceil(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks') = Len(sentChunks) + 1
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(chunks))
    /\ chunks' \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks') = Len(chunks) - 1
    /\ chunks' = Tail(chunks)
    /\ retransmitCount' \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount') = Len(retransmitCount) + 1
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceil(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = Len(chunks) - Len(chunks')
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = Len(chunks) - Len(chunks')

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets[i] = 0
        /\ \E j \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets[j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j]) \div (N - 1)
        /\ offsets[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = Append(known, known[Len(known)])
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, infected[Len(infected)])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \in SUBSET Pages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}^2
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        /\ turn' = 1 - turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

(* --type invariant
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

(* --specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)

(* --initial state
Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --next state
Next == 
  \/ \E n \in Node : 
       counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
  \/ \E n \in Node : 
       counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] ELSE Max(counts[][m])]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
*)

(* --global count
GlobalCount == Sum(\E n \in Node : Max(counts[][n]))
*)

(* --TLC configuration
CONSTANTS Node
vars == <<counts>>
*)

====
